fa-sensor-fire.appearanceId: a small rectangular or circular sensor device body with upward-curling flame shapes rising above it; sensor unit outline with a fire flame overlay
fa-sensor-fire.functionalityId: detects or reports a fire or heat event from a sensor device; triggers a fire alarm or heat threshold alert
fa-sensor-fire.intentId: monitor for fire or heat hazards using a sensor; indicate a fire detection device in a smart building or safety system

fa-sensor-on.appearanceId: a small rectangular or circular sensor device body with a radio wave arc or signal burst radiating outward indicating active state; sensor unit outline with an active signal or power-on indicator
fa-sensor-on.functionalityId: activates or indicates that a sensor is powered on and transmitting; confirms a sensor is live and operational
fa-sensor-on.intentId: indicate an active or powered-on sensor in a smart home or IoT interface; confirm sensor connectivity and live status

fa-server.appearanceId: a stack of two or three horizontal rectangular server rack units each with small circle and line details indicating drive bays and indicator lights; server hardware outline with stacked rack slabs
fa-server.functionalityId: represents a physical or virtual server or backend infrastructure; accesses server configuration or status in a hosting or IT interface
fa-server.intentId: manage or monitor server hardware or backend infrastructure; access server settings or status in an IT or cloud management interface

fa-shapes.appearanceId: a circle, a square, and a triangle grouped together in a compact arrangement; basic geometric shapes trio outline with circle, square, and triangle
fa-shapes.functionalityId: represents geometric shapes, a design element library, or a drawing tool palette; opens a shape selection or categorization interface
fa-shapes.intentId: access a shape library or drawing tool palette; select or categorize geometric shapes in a design or educational application

fa-share.appearanceId: a rightward-pointing arrow curving upward from a vertical baseline, with the tail anchored at the left; share arrow silhouette with a curved upward-right trajectory
fa-share.functionalityId: shares or sends content to another person or platform; exports or forwards an item from its current location
fa-share.intentId: share content, a link, or a file with another user or external platform; forward or export an item from an application

fa-share-all.appearanceId: two or three rightward-pointing arrows stacked vertically and curving upward from a common baseline, suggesting multiple simultaneous share actions; multiple share arrows grouped and offset vertically
fa-share-all.functionalityId: shares or forwards all items or multiple selections simultaneously; broadcasts content to multiple recipients at once
fa-share-all.intentId: share multiple items or broadcast content to all recipients at once; forward an entire selection or batch to external destinations

fa-share-alt.appearanceId: three small circles connected by two diagonal lines in a branching network node pattern, with one circle on the left and two on the right; network share nodes with connecting branch lines
fa-share-alt.functionalityId: shares content via a network or social sharing interface; opens a sharing menu connecting one source to multiple destinations
fa-share-alt.intentId: share content through a social network or multi-destination sharing interface; open a share menu for distributing content to multiple recipients

fa-share-alt-square.appearanceId: a square or rounded-square container enclosing three small circles connected by two diagonal branch lines in a network node pattern; square badge with a network share node diagram inside
fa-share-alt-square.functionalityId: shares content via a network sharing interface contained within a square button; opens a sharing menu from a square UI control
fa-share-alt-square.intentId: share content from a square sharing button or social network control; access a multi-destination share menu within a square interface element

fa-share-square.appearanceId: a square outline with a rightward-curving share arrow in the upper-right corner suggesting an outward export from the container; square frame with an upward-right arrow exiting from the corner
fa-share-square.functionalityId: shares or exports content out of a square container or panel; forwards an item from a framed or boxed UI element
fa-share-square.intentId: share or export content from a boxed panel or framed element; forward an item out of a contained section of an interface

fa-sheep.appearanceId: a sheep or lamb silhouette with a fluffy cloud-like woolly body, four short legs, and a small head with a snout; sheep animal outline with a rounded fleece body and small limbs
fa-sheep.functionalityId: represents a sheep or lamb animal in an agricultural or farming context; indicates livestock, wool production, or a farm animal category
fa-sheep.intentId: indicate a sheep or lamb in a farming, agricultural, or livestock application; represent wool production or farm animal content

fa-sheet-plastic.appearanceId: a flat rectangular sheet shape with a slightly wavy or irregular edge suggesting a flexible plastic film or wrap; flat plastic sheet outline with a subtly rippled or curled corner
fa-sheet-plastic.functionalityId: represents a plastic sheet, film wrap, or protective covering material; indicates packaging, plastic sheeting, or material type in a product interface
fa-sheet-plastic.intentId: select or indicate a plastic sheet or protective film material; represent packaging wrap or plastic covering in a materials or product catalog

fa-shelves.appearanceId: a shelving unit outline showing two or three horizontal shelf boards stacked vertically with small rectangular objects or items resting on the shelves; bookcase or storage rack with items on each shelf
fa-shelves.functionalityId: represents a storage shelf unit or inventory shelving; accesses or manages items stored on shelving in a warehouse or retail interface
fa-shelves.intentId: manage or browse items on storage shelves; indicate a shelving unit or inventory rack in a warehouse, retail, or home organization interface

fa-shelves-empty.appearanceId: a shelving unit outline showing two or three horizontal shelf boards stacked vertically with no items or objects on any of the shelves; bookcase or storage rack with bare empty shelf surfaces
fa-shelves-empty.functionalityId: represents an empty storage shelf unit with no inventory; indicates out-of-stock shelving or a cleared storage rack
fa-shelves-empty.intentId: indicate empty shelves or an out-of-stock inventory state; represent a cleared or restocking-needed shelving unit in a warehouse or retail interface

fa-shield.appearanceId: a plain heraldic shield silhouette with a flat top edge, curved sides tapering to a pointed bottom, and no interior markings; solid shield outline with no overlay or decoration
fa-shield.functionalityId: represents protection, security, or a defensive barrier; activates or indicates a shield or guard feature in a security interface
fa-shield.intentId: indicate protection, security, or defensive coverage; access a security or shield feature in an application or game interface

fa-shield-alt.appearanceId: a heraldic shield silhouette with an alternative or slightly different contour from the standard shield, such as a more angular top or rounded bottom; alternative shield outline variant with a distinct border style
fa-shield-alt.functionalityId: represents an alternative shield or security badge; indicates a variant security level or alternate protection symbol
fa-shield-alt.intentId: indicate an alternative security or protection status; access an alternate shield or security badge in an interface

fa-shield-cat.appearanceId: a heraldic shield silhouette with a cat face or cat silhouette centered inside the shield body, including pointed ears and whisker details; shield outline with a cat face or feline profile overlay
fa-shield-cat.functionalityId: represents protection or a security profile associated with a cat or pet; indicates a pet safety feature or a feline-themed security badge
fa-shield-cat.intentId: protect or manage a pet cat's safety profile; indicate a feline-themed security or protection feature in a pet or smart home interface

fa-shield-check.appearanceId: a heraldic shield silhouette with a checkmark or tick mark centered inside the shield body; shield outline with a verification checkmark overlay
fa-shield-check.functionalityId: represents a verified, approved, or passing security status; confirms that a security check has been completed successfully
fa-shield-check.intentId: indicate a verified or approved security status; confirm that a protection check has passed in a security or compliance interface

fa-shield-cross.appearanceId: a heraldic shield silhouette with a cross or plus symbol centered inside the shield body, with arms extending toward the shield edges; shield outline with a centered cross or Christian cross overlay
fa-shield-cross.functionalityId: represents a medically protected status or a cross-bearing security emblem; indicates a health shield, crusader badge, or cross-themed protection symbol
fa-shield-cross.intentId: indicate a medical shield or cross-bearing protection emblem; represent a health-related security badge or crusader-themed shield

fa-shield-dog.appearanceId: a heraldic shield silhouette with a dog face or dog silhouette centered inside the shield body, including rounded ears and a snout; shield outline with a dog face or canine profile overlay
fa-shield-dog.functionalityId: represents protection or a security profile associated with a dog or pet; indicates a pet safety feature or a canine-themed security badge
fa-shield-dog.intentId: protect or manage a pet dog's safety profile; indicate a canine-themed security or protection feature in a pet or smart home interface

fa-shield-exclamation.appearanceId: a heraldic shield silhouette with an exclamation mark centered inside the shield body; shield outline with a warning or alert exclamation point overlay
fa-shield-exclamation.functionalityId: represents a security warning, threat alert, or protection issue requiring attention; indicates that a shield or security status has a critical alert
fa-shield-exclamation.intentId: indicate a security threat or protection warning; flag a critical alert or issue on a security shield in an interface

fa-shield-heart.appearanceId: a heraldic shield silhouette with a heart shape centered inside the shield body; shield outline with a heart or love symbol overlay
fa-shield-heart.functionalityId: represents protected health, loved ones' safety, or a health insurance shield; indicates a healthcare protection plan or a loved-ones security feature
fa-shield-heart.intentId: indicate health protection, loved ones' safety, or a health insurance shield; represent a caring or health-focused security feature

fa-shield-keyhole.appearanceId: a heraldic shield silhouette with a keyhole shape centered inside the shield body, showing the circular top and narrow vertical slot of a keyhole; shield outline with a keyhole privacy or lock overlay
fa-shield-keyhole.functionalityId: represents private security, locked protection, or access-controlled shielding; indicates a locked or private security state requiring authentication
fa-shield-keyhole.intentId: indicate a locked or private security state; represent access-controlled protection or a privacy shield in an authentication interface

fa-shield-minus.appearanceId: a heraldic shield silhouette with a horizontal minus bar centered inside the shield body; shield outline with a subtract or remove minus sign overlay
fa-shield-minus.functionalityId: removes or downgrades a security level or protection feature; decrements a shield tier or removes a security layer
fa-shield-minus.intentId: reduce or remove a security protection level; downgrade a shield status or remove a security layer in an interface

fa-shield-plus.appearanceId: a heraldic shield silhouette with a plus sign centered inside the shield body; shield outline with an add or upgrade plus sign overlay
fa-shield-plus.functionalityId: adds or upgrades a security level or protection feature; increments a shield tier or adds a new security layer
fa-shield-plus.intentId: add or upgrade a security protection level; enhance a shield status or add a security layer in an interface

fa-shield-quartered.appearanceId: a heraldic shield silhouette divided into four equal quadrants by a vertical and horizontal line crossing at the center, creating four separate interior sections; shield outline with four divided quarter sections
fa-shield-quartered.functionalityId: represents a quartered heraldic shield or a four-part security classification; indicates a multi-zone or multi-tiered protection scheme
fa-shield-quartered.intentId: indicate a multi-zone or four-part security configuration; represent a heraldic quartered shield or a segmented protection scheme

fa-shield-slash.appearanceId: a heraldic shield silhouette with a diagonal slash line drawn through the entire shield shape; shield outline with a forward-slash strikethrough across the full body
fa-shield-slash.functionalityId: indicates that a shield or security feature is disabled, blocked, or unavailable; removes or deactivates a protection layer
fa-shield-slash.intentId: disable or deactivate a security shield or protection feature; indicate that shielding or security is currently unavailable

fa-shield-times.appearanceId: a heraldic shield silhouette with an X mark or times symbol centered inside the shield body; shield outline with a close or cancel X glyph overlay
fa-shield-times.functionalityId: rejects, cancels, or removes a security shield or protection status; indicates a failed or denied security check
fa-shield-times.intentId: reject or cancel a security protection status; indicate a failed or denied security check in a protection interface

fa-shield-virus.appearanceId: a heraldic shield silhouette with a virus particle shape centered inside, showing a round body with short spike protrusions; shield outline with a spiky virus particle overlay
fa-shield-virus.functionalityId: represents antivirus protection or defense against a biological or digital virus threat; indicates a virus-blocking or antivirus security feature
fa-shield-virus.intentId: indicate antivirus or anti-malware protection; represent defense against a virus threat in a cybersecurity or health protection interface

fa-ship.appearanceId: a large cargo or passenger ship silhouette viewed from the side with a hull, deck superstructure, and smokestack or mast visible; ocean vessel outline with hull and upper deck structures
fa-ship.functionalityId: represents a ship, ferry, or maritime vessel in a transport or logistics context; indicates sea freight, ocean travel, or shipping routes
fa-ship.intentId: indicate sea freight, ocean shipping, or maritime travel; access shipping routes or vessel tracking in a logistics or travel interface

fa-shirt.appearanceId: a short-sleeved crew-neck t-shirt silhouette viewed from the front with a round neckline, short sleeves, and a rectangular body; classic t-shirt garment outline with short sleeves
fa-shirt.functionalityId: represents a t-shirt or casual shirt garment in a clothing or apparel interface; selects or categorizes a short-sleeved top
fa-shirt.intentId: select or browse a t-shirt or short-sleeved top in a clothing or e-commerce interface; indicate a casual shirt garment category

fa-shirt-long-sleeve.appearanceId: a long-sleeved crew-neck shirt silhouette viewed from the front with extended sleeves reaching the wrist and a rectangular body; long-sleeve garment outline with full-length sleeves
fa-shirt-long-sleeve.functionalityId: represents a long-sleeved shirt or top in a clothing or apparel interface; selects or categorizes a full-sleeve garment
fa-shirt-long-sleeve.intentId: select or browse a long-sleeved shirt in a clothing or e-commerce interface; indicate a full-sleeve garment category

fa-shirt-running.appearanceId: a sleeveless or short-sleeved athletic shirt silhouette with a racerback or running-specific cut, suggesting a performance sports top; athletic running jersey outline with a sporty or racerback cut
fa-shirt-running.functionalityId: represents a running or athletic jersey in a sports or apparel interface; selects or categorizes a performance running top
fa-shirt-running.intentId: select or browse a running jersey or athletic shirt in a sports or e-commerce interface; indicate a performance running garment category

fa-shirt-tank-top.appearanceId: a sleeveless tank top shirt silhouette with wide armhole cutouts, shoulder straps, and a rectangular body and no sleeves; tank top garment outline with open-shoulder armholes and straps
fa-shirt-tank-top.functionalityId: represents a tank top or sleeveless shirt in a clothing or apparel interface; selects or categorizes a sleeveless top garment
fa-shirt-tank-top.intentId: select or browse a tank top or sleeveless shirt in a clothing or e-commerce interface; indicate a sleeveless garment category

fa-shish-kebab.appearanceId: a long skewer stick with alternating pieces of meat and vegetables threaded along its length at regular intervals; kebab skewer outline with alternating food chunks
fa-shish-kebab.functionalityId: represents a shish kebab dish in a food menu or recipe context; indicates grilled skewer food or a Middle Eastern cuisine category
fa-shish-kebab.intentId: select or display a shish kebab in a food menu or recipe application; indicate a grilled skewer dish in a restaurant or culinary interface

fa-shoe-prints.appearanceId: two footprint or shoe-sole silhouettes shown in a walking stride pattern, one slightly ahead and offset from the other; left and right shoe print outlines in a stepping arrangement
fa-shoe-prints.functionalityId: represents walking, footsteps, or a path of movement; indicates a pedestrian route, step counting, or footwear in a tracking or fitness context
fa-shoe-prints.intentId: track walking steps or indicate a pedestrian path; represent footwear or step-counting in a fitness, navigation, or walking direction interface

fa-shop.appearanceId: a small storefront building silhouette with a rectangular facade, an awning or canopy over a display window, and an entry door; shop building outline with a canopy and storefront window
fa-shop.functionalityId: represents a retail shop, store, or marketplace; opens or accesses a storefront, product listing, or retail location in an interface
fa-shop.intentId: access a retail store or marketplace; browse or manage a shop or storefront in a commerce or location-based interface

fa-shop-lock.appearanceId: a small storefront building silhouette with an awning and a small padlock shape overlaid on or beside the facade; shop building outline with a lock badge indicating closure or restricted access
fa-shop-lock.functionalityId: represents a locked, closed, or restricted-access shop; indicates that a store is temporarily unavailable or access-controlled
fa-shop-lock.intentId: indicate a locked or closed store in a commerce interface; represent restricted access or temporary closure of a retail shop

fa-shop-slash.appearanceId: a small storefront building silhouette with a diagonal slash line drawn through the entire facade; shop building outline with a forward-slash strikethrough
fa-shop-slash.functionalityId: represents a closed, unavailable, or deactivated shop; indicates that a store or marketplace is not currently accessible
fa-shop-slash.intentId: indicate that a shop or store is closed or unavailable; deactivate or remove a storefront in a commerce or marketplace interface

fa-shopping-basket-alt.appearanceId: a woven or open-weave basket silhouette with two arching handles meeting at the top and a round or oval body with a lattice or crosshatch pattern; alternative shopping basket outline with arched handles and woven body
fa-shopping-basket-alt.functionalityId: represents an alternative shopping basket or cart in an e-commerce interface; adds items to or views a shopping basket
fa-shopping-basket-alt.intentId: add items to a shopping basket or view cart contents in an e-commerce interface; access an alternative shopping container in a retail application

fa-shortcake.appearanceId: a layered shortcake or strawberry shortcake silhouette showing a round cake base with a cream layer and a whole strawberry or berry on top; shortcake dessert outline with layers and a fruit topping
fa-shortcake.functionalityId: represents a shortcake or layered fruit dessert in a food menu or bakery context; indicates a dessert category or shortcake recipe
fa-shortcake.intentId: select or display a shortcake dessert in a food or bakery menu; indicate a layered fruit cake in a dessert or recipe application

fa-shovel.appearanceId: a shovel tool silhouette with a long straight handle and a wide flat rectangular or rounded blade at the bottom; digging shovel outline with a handle and spade-head blade
fa-shovel.functionalityId: represents a digging, gardening, or excavation tool; indicates a dig action, ground preparation, or construction task
fa-shovel.intentId: perform a digging or excavation task; select a shovel tool in a gardening, construction, or landscaping interface

fa-shovel-snow.appearanceId: a snow shovel silhouette with a long handle and a wide curved or flat scoop blade, often with small snow flakes or a wider scoop angle suggesting snow removal; snow shovel outline with a broad scoop blade
fa-shovel-snow.functionalityId: represents a snow shovel or snow removal tool; indicates a snow-clearing task or winter maintenance action
fa-shovel-snow.intentId: perform a snow removal or winter maintenance task; select a snow shovel in a weather or outdoor maintenance interface

fa-shower.appearanceId: a shower head silhouette viewed from below showing a round or rectangular perforated head with water droplet streams radiating downward from multiple holes; shower head outline with downward water spray pattern
fa-shower.functionalityId: represents a shower fixture or bathroom feature; indicates a shower facility, water usage setting, or bathroom amenity
fa-shower.intentId: indicate a shower facility or bathroom amenity; access shower settings or water usage controls in a home or hotel interface

fa-shower-alt.appearanceId: an alternative shower head silhouette with a slightly different head shape, mounting arm, or spray pattern compared to the standard shower icon; alternate shower head outline with a varied arm or spray orientation
fa-shower-alt.functionalityId: represents an alternative shower fixture or a second bathroom shower option; indicates an alternate shower setting or fixture style
fa-shower-alt.intentId: indicate an alternative shower fixture or secondary bathroom shower; access an alternate shower setting in a home or hospitality interface

fa-shredder.appearanceId: a paper shredder machine silhouette with a rectangular body, a slot opening at the top for paper insertion, and shredded paper strips visible below; shredder device outline with a paper feed slot and shredded strip output
fa-shredder.functionalityId: represents a paper shredder machine for destroying documents; shreds, destroys, or permanently deletes sensitive content
fa-shredder.intentId: shred or permanently destroy sensitive documents; indicate a document shredding or secure data deletion action in an office or security interface

fa-shrimp.appearanceId: a shrimp or prawn silhouette with a curved segmented body, tail fan, and small legs or antennae; crustacean outline with a curved body and tail fan shape
fa-shrimp.functionalityId: represents a shrimp or prawn seafood item in a food menu or recipe context; indicates a seafood dish or crustacean ingredient
fa-shrimp.intentId: select or display a shrimp or prawn in a seafood menu or recipe application; indicate a crustacean ingredient in a food or restaurant interface

fa-shutters.appearanceId: a pair of rectangular window shutter panels shown closed or slightly open, each panel with horizontal louvered slat lines; window shutters outline with horizontal slat details on two panels
fa-shutters.functionalityId: represents window shutters or louvered panels for light and privacy control; opens, closes, or adjusts window shutter settings
fa-shutters.intentId: control or adjust window shutters for light or privacy; indicate window shutter hardware or home automation shutter settings

fa-shuttle-space.appearanceId: a space shuttle silhouette viewed from the side showing a delta-winged orbiter with a pointed nose cone, a large tail fin, and engine nozzles at the rear; NASA-style space shuttle orbiter outline with delta wings and tail assembly
fa-shuttle-space.functionalityId: represents a space shuttle vehicle or space exploration mission; indicates aerospace, space travel, or launch-related content
fa-shuttle-space.intentId: indicate space travel, a shuttle launch, or aerospace content; represent a space mission or space exploration theme in an application
